assertions.assertion: Mentions DefaultClockSkew as the relevant setting
assertions.rationale: Mentions 'MaxClockSkew' on a generic Saml2Options, not the specific 'DefaultClockSkew' setting.
Uses Saml2Options.MaxClockSkew instead of the correct options.Saml.DefaultClockSkew path.

assertions.assertion: Suggests increasing the value beyond the default 5 minutes
assertions.rationale: Suggests increasing from 5 minutes to 10 minutes.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest changes to the OIDC/OAuth configuration — this is SAML-specific
assertions.rationale: Suggests changing options.Authentication.CookieLifetime which is an OIDC/cookie configuration, not SAML-specific.
